Bash(lsof -i :4200 2>/dev/null || netstat -ano | grep 4200 || echo "Port 4200 appears to be free")
Bash(sleep 10 && lsof -i :4200 2>/dev/null | head -3 || netstat -ano | grep 4200 | head -3 || echo "Waiting for server to start...")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" 2>&1; sleep 2; netstat -ano | grep 4200 | grep LISTEN || echo "Port 4200 is now free")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 3256 -Force" 2>&1; sleep 2; netstat -ano | grep 4200 | grep LISTEN || echo "✓ Port 4200 is now free")
